creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: Upstream has made changes similar to what's included rozhuk.im's build_patch.  Could you try the patch I just attached against the latest ports tree?  I have tested it on the latest version on 12.1-amd64 and 11.3-i386 with success, but don't have a 12-STABLE or CURRENT system to test with.  There might be a separate build issue on CURRENT.
